---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[REQUEST]"
labels: ''
assignees: BismarckShuffle

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or mechanic you want added to the mod.

## Core Mechanics
* How does it work?
* How does the player interact with it?
* Crafting recipe ideas (if applicable):

## Why should this be added?
Explain how this feature improves gameplay or fits into the theme of the mod.

## Asset Requirements
* Textures needed: [e.g., Item icons, block textures]
* Models/Animations needed: [e.g., Custom JSON model, entity animations]
